description: Create and deploy a new COVID-19 screening consultation template in MedinTux. Within the 'Masques' directory of the DrTux program folder (Wine prefix), create a subdirectory named 'Protocoles_Urgence' containing a valid HTML file named 'Depistage_COVID19.html'. The file must include the title 'PROTOCOLE DEPISTAGE RESPIRATOIRE' and the fields: 'Température (°C):', 'Saturation O2 (%):', 'Toux (Oui/Non):', 'Dyspnée (Oui/Non):', 'Anosmie/Agueusie (Oui/Non):', and 'Score de Gravité:'.
